architectureDecisions.title: WebSocket for real-time communication
architectureDecisions.decision: Use Socket.IO over raw WebSockets for cross-browser compatibility and auto-reconnection

architectureDecisions.title: Redis for pub/sub
architectureDecisions.decision: Use Redis pub/sub for horizontal scaling of WebSocket connections

techApproach.database: PostgreSQL for messages, Redis for presence

userStories.title: Send and receive messages in real-time
